form.formComment: Mare returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second of 15 at Saint-Cloud November 20 over 1200m, in the wet; 1.3 len behind Bid For Chester with 59.5kg at $17. First up last campaign third of 15 at Fontainebleau March 1 2025 over 1600m, soft track; 6 len behind Lepard carrying 58.5kg at $18. Excellent chance.
